subject: [TOX] Force py3.8 in tox.ini and fix lint problems
commit_message:
[TOX] Force py3.8 in tox.ini and fix lint problems

- It allows leveraging on OpenStack Yoga's upper-contraints
without any exception.
- Use only gitlint-core as a dependency

Issue-ID: DOC-782
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Signed-off-by: Cédric Ollivier <cedric.ollivier@orange.com>
Change-Id: I05d6b683fda61cabed4e5e812ddc3d37ae5e28b6
(cherry picked from commit 92cdf226933eab1f422e30f2ead2ee153016cd84)

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-jakarta-commit-lint/24/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-jakarta-commit-lint/24/ )
